overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a video game depicting a samurai character walking through a snow-covered Japanese temple complex at night. The character approaches the main shrine building from an open courtyard and enters the dimly lit interior with traditional altar and lanterns.

scene_state.functional_zone: snow-covered temple courtyard with traditional wooden buildings

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the snowy temple courtyard toward the main shrine building

notable_agents.action: villager in traditional clothing walking past the camera from right to left

entered.detail: open courtyard ground covered in snow with visible footprints
large traditional wooden shrine building with curved snow-covered roof and lit entrance
auxiliary wooden temple structures with warm light glowing from windows
tall pine trees surrounding the temple complex against the night sky
traditional stone lantern partially covered in snow near the path

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a serene snow-covered temple courtyard under a clear night sky. Traditional wooden buildings with glowing windows line the path, and a large shrine building stands ahead. A villager in traditional clothing passes by as the character approaches the main hall.

scene_state.functional_zone: interior shrine hall with altar and paper lanterns

events.description: character enters the temple building from the snowy courtyard, transitioning from moonlight to warm lantern-lit interior

agents.ego_description: walking up wooden stairs and entering the shrine interior, approaching the central altar

entered.detail: wooden shrine altar with offerings, decorative items, and hanging ornaments
polished wooden floorboards of the shrine interior
illuminated traditional paper lanterns on wooden stands providing warm light
tall green banners with red symbols flanking the altar
wooden table with fruit offerings and ceremonial objects

segments.scene_description: The character enters the temple building, leaving the snowy night behind for a dimly lit interior illuminated by paper lanterns. The wooden shrine hall features a central altar with offerings, flanked by green ceremonial banners. The character walks across the wooden floor toward the sacred altar area.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a serene, snow-covered temple courtyard into the dimly lit sanctuary of a traditional shrine. It begins with the character walking under a clear night sky past wooden buildings with glowing windows, moving toward a large shrine building as a villager in traditional clothing passes by. As the character reaches the entrance, the scene shifts from the cold, open air of the snowy night to the sheltered interior of the temple hall. The environment then transforms into a space illuminated by soft paper lanterns, where the camera follows the character across wooden floors flanked by green ceremonial banners. Finally, the movement concludes as the character approaches a central altar adorned with sacred offerings.
